buggy_code: symbols = [f[:-4] for f in os.listdir(path) if f[0] != '.']
clean_code:
# Load from a historical point-in-time universe that includes delisted symbols
symbols = load_historical_universe(as_of_date=start_date)
description: Symbol list is derived from files currently present on disk.
explanation: os.listdir() returns only files that exist today. If you downloaded data for currently-listed S&P 500 stocks, every delisted or bankrupt company is missing. Your backtest never loses money on stocks that went to zero, which massively inflates performance.
suggested_fix: Use a point-in-time historical universe that includes all companies that were in the index at each date, including those subsequently delisted.

issues.title: Survivorship bias from static symbol list
